commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: The Pharisees find fault at the disciples for eating with unwashen hands8 They break the commandment of God by the traditions of men14Meat defileth not the Prayer of Manasseh 24He healeth the Syrophenician woman"s daughter of an unclean spirit, 31and one that was deaf, and stammered in his speech.
